title: Autonomous loop operator plan quality summary in recommended action v0
problem: Ticket-339 surfaces scratch autonomous loop quality in autonomous_loop_scratch_status, but next_recommended_action.reason does not yet mention the last research_quality_verdict or weakest_dimension when a scratch report exists.
acceptance_criteria: When scratch report status is ok, next_recommended_action.reason includes research_quality_verdict and weakest_dimension.
When status is not_run, reason unchanged from ticket-338 baseline.
No queue writes or ticket promotion.
